---
title: "Joyi Zhang"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:joz021@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/joyi-zhang-731331341
toc: false
---

MS in Business Analytics @ UCSD | Data Analyst | Business Analytics | Dashboarding & Reporting | Python | Consulting, Supply Chain & Finance

Fun fact: I write novels, debate my dog's opinions, and dance in heels.

## Tools

```{=html}
<div class="tools-grid">
  <div class="tools-row">
    <span class="tools-cat-label">Languages</span>
    <div class="tools-chips">
      <span class="chip chip-lang">Python</span>
      <span class="chip chip-lang">SQL</span>
      <span class="chip chip-lang">R</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tools-row">
    <span class="tools-cat-label">Analytics &amp; BI</span>
    <div class="tools-chips">
      <span class="chip chip-bi">Tableau</span>
      <span class="chip chip-bi">Power BI</span>
      <span class="chip chip-bi">Excel / VBA</span>
      <span class="chip chip-bi">Google Analytics</span>
      <span class="chip chip-bi">Salesforce</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="tools-row">
    <span class="tools-cat-label">Data Engineering</span>
    <div class="tools-chips">
      <span class="chip chip-eng">PySpark</span>
      <span class="chip chip-eng">AWS</span>
      <span class="chip chip-eng">Databricks</span>
      <span class="chip chip-eng">BigQuery</span>
      <span class="chip chip-eng">ETL</span>
      <span class="chip chip-eng">Git</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Experience

```{=html}
<div class="timeline">

  <!-- Thermo Fisher Scientific -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c1">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <img src="files/logos/thermo-fisher.png" alt="TF"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex'">
      <span class="tl-init">TF</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">Thermo Fisher Scientific</span>
          <span class="tl-title">Data Analyst (Capstone) · San Diego, CA</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">Feb 2026 – Present</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>Developed a supply chain risk early-flagging framework via Python-SQL based ETL workflows to identify key drivers of OTTP% misses, leveraging query-sourced order, inventory, ATP, and pharma backlog trends across SKUs</li>
        <li>Partnered with cross-functional business stakeholders to validate root-cause and ML indicators, translate insights into operational recommendations and deploy the solution in Databricks and PowerBI for sustainable decision support</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Checkit Analytics -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c2">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <img src="files/logos/checkit.png" alt="CK"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex'">
      <span class="tl-init">CK</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">Checkit Analytics</span>
          <span class="tl-title">Digital Marketing Intern · San Diego, CA</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">Feb 2026 – Present</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>Developed a cross-channel marketing machine learning framework by wrangling data using Python, identifying top-performing content on views, engagement, and subscriber conversion</li>
        <li>Built BI-style analyses to segment user behavior and identify high-performing content drivers</li>
        <li>Designed a social media content intelligence pipeline using Claude API to uncover high-performing messaging patterns and accelerate product experimentation (A/B test), improving content prototype usability by ~30%</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fudan AI3 -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c3">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <span class="tl-init" style="display:flex">AI³</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">Fudan University AI³ Institute × Alibaba Koubei</span>
          <span class="tl-title">Data Scientist Intern · Shanghai, China</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">Apr 2025 – Jun 2025</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>Co-built a retail traffic forecasting system using O2O data (~1M records, 2,000 merchants), supporting inventory and staffing decisions and reducing an estimated 14% operational costs</li>
        <li>Cleaned and engineered production-ready time-series datasets in Python by performing EDA, joins, quality checks and feature engineering to ensure reliable downstream machine learning analytics</li>
        <li>Delivered merchant-facing dashboards in PowerBI by integrating demand signals with contextual factors (weather, local events), informing targeted operational strategies and identifying city-level customer lifecycle values</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- S&P Global -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c4">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <img src="files/logos/sp-global.png" alt="S&amp;P"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex'">
      <span class="tl-init">S&amp;P</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">S&amp;P Global</span>
          <span class="tl-title">Consultant Intern, Mobility Group · Shanghai, China</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">May 2024 – Nov 2024</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>Conducted 10+ data-driven market and strategy studies on EV sector, covering OEM product strategies, platform roadmaps, net growth and demand outlook, delivering actionable insights via decks and Tableau dashboards</li>
        <li>Used SQL-based ad hoc analysis to maintain and report recurring competitive intelligence datasets, performing reconciliation to ensure data accuracy and consistency across reporting cycles</li>
        <li>Collected powertrain data (50K+ records) via Python by integrating APIs and web scraping, standardizing outputs into ESG metrics, and working cross-functionally with global teams to support a shared assessment database for research</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- East West Bank -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c1">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <img src="files/logos/east-west-bank.png" alt="EW"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex'">
      <span class="tl-init">EW</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">East West Bank</span>
          <span class="tl-title">FP&amp;A Intern · Shanghai, China</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">Nov 2023 – Mar 2024</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>Maintained Asset-Liability Committee reports and Excel frameworks to track monthly accounting trends, providing directors with performance reports in PPT</li>
        <li>Tracked budget execution, cost ratios, and loan KPIs by unit using Excel formulas (VLOOKUP) and pivot tables, creating dynamic visualizations to help VPs interpret spending patterns</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```

## Education

```{=html}
<div class="timeline">

  <!-- UCSD MSBA -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c1">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <img src="files/logos/ucsd.png" alt="UC"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex'">
      <span class="tl-init">UC</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">UC San Diego, Rady School of Management</span>
          <span class="tl-title">M.S. Business Analytics</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">Aug 2025 – Jun 2026</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>GPA: 3.84 / 4.0</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Fudan University -->
  <div class="tl-item tl-c2">
    <div class="tl-dot">
      <img src="files/logos/fudan.png" alt="FDU"
           onerror="this.style.display='none'; this.nextElementSibling.style.display='flex'">
      <span class="tl-init">FDU</span>
    </div>
    <div class="tl-body">
      <div class="tl-header">
        <div class="tl-meta">
          <span class="tl-org">Fudan University, Shanghai</span>
          <span class="tl-title">B.A. Literature, Minor in Finance</span>
        </div>
        <span class="tl-date">Sep 2021 – Jun 2025</span>
      </div>
      <ul class="tl-bullets">
        <li>GPA: 3.51 / 4.0</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
